testcase.name: successfulPayment_confirmsOrder
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-11T02:27:03.017+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.cart.api.CartController : Creating new cart 2026-05-11T02:27:03.032+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.cart.api.CartController : Adding item to cart cartId=2 productId=SKU-A 2026-05-11T02:27:03.032+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.cart.api.CartController : Checkout requested cartId=2 2026-05-11T02:27:03.048+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] c.e.payment.api.OrderPaymentController : Payment start requested orderId=2 2026-05-11T02:27:03.063+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] c.e.p.api.PaymentWebhookController : Payment webhook received providerEventId=evt-fa4751a6-6b26-456c-a007-369f7bfaf5d2 paymentAttemptId=2 2026-05-11T02:27:03.066+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.order.api.OrderController : Fetching order orderId=2

testcase.name: failedPayment_retryThenSuccess
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-11T02:27:03.086+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.cart.api.CartController : Creating new cart 2026-05-11T02:27:03.098+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.cart.api.CartController : Adding item to cart cartId=3 productId=SKU-B 2026-05-11T02:27:03.099+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.cart.api.CartController : Checkout requested cartId=3 2026-05-11T02:27:03.119+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] c.e.payment.api.OrderPaymentController : Payment start requested orderId=3 2026-05-11T02:27:03.137+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] c.e.p.api.PaymentWebhookController : Payment webhook received providerEventId=evt-fail-dc0112eb-c6ec-4bc1-953c-f8886d98e56b paymentAttemptId=3 2026-05-11T02:27:03.154+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.order.api.OrderController : Fetching order orderId=3 2026-05-11T02:27:03.164+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] c.e.payment.api.OrderPaymentController : Payment start requested orderId=3 2026-05-11T02:27:03.199+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] c.e.p.api.PaymentWebhookController : Payment webhook received providerEventId=evt-ok-d46f7852-4596-4fc5-bf65-365e3e2ddea4 paymentAttemptId=4 2026-05-11T02:27:03.221+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.order.api.OrderController : Fetching order orderId=3

testcase.name: duplicatePaymentStart_returnsExistingInitiatedAttempt
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-11T02:27:03.229+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.cart.api.CartController : Creating new cart 2026-05-11T02:27:03.232+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.cart.api.CartController : Adding item to cart cartId=4 productId=SKU-D 2026-05-11T02:27:03.249+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.cart.api.CartController : Checkout requested cartId=4 2026-05-11T02:27:03.264+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] c.e.payment.api.OrderPaymentController : Payment start requested orderId=4 2026-05-11T02:27:03.280+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] c.e.payment.api.OrderPaymentController : Payment start requested orderId=4

testcase.name: duplicateWebhook_isIdempotent
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-11T02:27:03.297+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.cart.api.CartController : Creating new cart 2026-05-11T02:27:03.314+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.cart.api.CartController : Adding item to cart cartId=5 productId=SKU-C 2026-05-11T02:27:03.314+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] com.exequt.cart.api.CartController : Checkout requested cartId=5 2026-05-11T02:27:03.330+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] c.e.payment.api.OrderPaymentController : Payment start requested orderId=5 2026-05-11T02:27:03.331+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] c.e.p.api.PaymentWebhookController : Payment webhook received providerEventId=evt-dup-9c30b35b-1716-4bf8-bd1d-e55000778a20 paymentAttemptId=6 2026-05-11T02:27:03.347+03:00 INFO 44768 --- [exequt-cart-checkout] [ main] c.e.p.api.PaymentWebhookController : Payment webhook received providerEventId=evt-dup-9c30b35b-1716-4bf8-bd1d-e55000778a20 paymentAttemptId=6
